emotional_tone: Authority, Clarity, Truth, Modern, Minimalist, Cinematic

rules: Never center default text, define explicit alignment (mostly left-aligned).

surface_strategies.cards: border-collapse style layout, 1px subtle border (border-white/10), rounded-none, flat background (#141414)
surface_strategies.header: Crystal Glassmorphism (bg-black/60 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-white/10) with z-50 fixed positioning

components.buttons: rounded-none border border-white bg-white text-black hover:bg-transparent hover:text-white transition-all px-6 py-3 font-medium text-sm tracking-wide uppercase
components.inputs: Shadcn based, flat background (#0A0A0A), border-white/20, text-white, focus:border-white focus:ring-1 focus:ring-white rounded-none
components.navigation: Logo + links + Primary CTA. Links visible on desktop. Header uses Crystal Glassmorphism.
components.icons: @phosphor-icons/react (Duotone weight for marketing, Regular for dashboard)

home.hero: h-screen, full-bleed image with bg-black/40 overlay. Massive left-aligned H1. 'Book a Shoot' CTA.
home.services_overview: Tetris bento grid showcasing real estate, commercial, and mapping. Asymmetrical spans.
home.about_teaser: Image of drone pilot + text about FAA Part 107 certification and high-end DJI equipment.

services.layout: Grid borders (technical look) detailing DJI models, service areas, and delivery times.

portfolio.layout: Masonry or tight grid of high-res images. Must include a 'Before / After' interactive slider component (custom HTML/React) for color grading showcase.

pricing.layout: 3 columns. 'Tracing Beam' border effect on the most popular/middle package. Clear breakdown of deliverables.

booking.layout: Integrated calendar (Shadcn Calendar + form) -> leads to Stripe payment flow. Minimalist, form-focused, Swiss precision.

client_dashboard.layout: Control Room Grid. Sidebar navigation. Google Auth login. Gallery of downloadable assets, invoice history.

ai_chat.layout: Floating widget in bottom right. Minimalist chat window, using Claude for visitor queries (pricing, availability).

hero_image.description: White and brown concrete luxury building near body of water during sunset

portfolio_2.description: Aerial view of a large field with a lake

drone_equipment.description: Shallow focus photography of a DJI quadcopter drone

drone_pilot.description: Person controlling drone camera, looking focused

technical_rules.data_testid: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case, role-based format (e.g., data-testid='hero-cta-button').
technical_rules.animation: Framer Motion for page transitions and staggering. Use Lenis for smooth scrolling.
technical_rules.components: Use custom HTML/Tailwind for marketing layout. Use heavily customized Shadcn for dashboard and forms.
technical_rules.accessibility: respect prefers-reduced-motion, min 4.5:1 contrast ratio, always explicitly set text color on hover/focus.
